Cindergrove Advisors Incwww.cindergroveadvisors.com
August 13, 2001
Cindergrove Advisors Inc
Mr. Darryl Rogers, VP Finance, Snow-Berry
Re: Inventory Control Study
Dear Mr. Rogers:
This letter will confirm the arrangements we have discussed for an inventory control
study at Snow-Berry. We appreciate the confidence Snow-Berry has placed in our firm,
and we are prepared to begin work on August 23, 2001.
The purpose of the study is to examine the methods by which Snow-Berry orders,
receives, stores, and issues inventory, and to recommend improvements in the
accuracy of the records and the control of stock. Our work will proceed in the manner
described in our proposal: interviews with the responsible personnel, observation of
operations at the warehouse and on the plant floor, analysis of the ordering and
count records, and a written report setting out our findings together with a practical
program for carrying out the recommendations. We expect the study to run
approximately five months from the start of fieldwork.
Kimberly Price, Senior Consultant, will direct the engagement and will be your
principal contact for its day-to-day conduct. Andrea Diaz, Consultant, will perform the
on-site fieldwork and the review of records. I will review all work personally before it
leaves our office.
Our fee for the study will be $82,500, which covers professional time and ordinary
out-of-pocket expenses. Should the scope of the work change materially, we will
advise you in writing before proceeding, and no addition to the fee will be made
without your written approval.
If these terms are satisfactory, please sign both copies of this letter where indicated,
return one to our office by fax, and retain the other for your file. The countersigned
original may follow by mail. We are pleased to be of service to Snow-Berry and look
forward to a productive engagement.
Very truly yours,
Cindergrove Advisors Inc
Page 1 of 2

Carlos Griffith
President
Date: August 13, 2001
Darryl Rogers
VP Finance, Snow-Berry
Date: August 13, 2001
Cindergrove Advisors Inc
